performance.evidence: All 71 project tests completed in 0.611 seconds; profile operations are local and synchronous. No project-specific performance threshold exists.

reliability.evidence: Atomic metadata replacement, corrupt-state rejection, cleanup after failed creation, retry-safe deletion, duplicate preservation, and missing-credential behavior are covered offline.

operability.evidence: CLI help and invalid-input behavior passed; list/show expose safe state; unavailable keyrings and deferred auth kinds produce actionable pre-network failures.
